mapper.select: SELECT CASE #{type} WHEN 'day' THEN DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN 'week' THEN CONCAT(YEARWEEK(create_time), '周') WHEN 'month' THEN DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') END AS time, SUM(actual_amount) AS sales FROM sys_order WHERE status IN ('1', '2') AND create_time BETWEEN #{beginTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT CASE #{type} WHEN 'day' THEN DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN 'week' THEN CONCAT(YEARWEEK(create_time), '周') WHEN 'month' THEN DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') END AS time, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM sys_order WHERE status IN ('1', '2') AND create_time BETWEEN #{beginTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
